## Summary

What this PR changes, in one or two sentences.

## Motivation

Why now? Link the issue (`Closes #N`) or briefly explain the trigger.

- ...

## Architectural impact

- [ ] Touches the persistence schema (`Events` / `Submissions` / `Talks`)
- [ ] Adds or modifies an MAF agent
- [ ] Affects OpenClaw or the approval gate
- [ ] Adds or updates an ADR under `docs/adr/`

## Verification

How did you verify this works? Tests, manual run, screenshots, App Insights traces. For Phase 1, a clean markdown render and `samples/` JSON validation is enough.

## Checklist

- [ ] No real CFP data, contact info, or other personal data
- [ ] No secrets, connection strings, keys, or subscription IDs (not even commented out)
- [ ] No references to "Semantic Kernel" — the framework is **Microsoft Agent Framework**
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or contracts changed
- [ ] Conventional commit style on the merge commit
